name: Submariner Date
description:
The Rolex Submariner Date is more than a watch — it's a statement. Originally designed for professional divers, the Submariner has become the most recognized luxury sports watch in the world. Its clean lines, luminous dial, and rotating bezel are instantly recognizable from boardroom to beach.

This Artemis edition features a black dial with luminous hour markers, a unidirectional rotating bezel with Cerachrom insert, and the iconic Oyster bracelet with Oysterclasp. Every detail is executed with precision that only Rolex achieves. The weight on your wrist is exactly what you'd expect from a legend.
descriptionShort: The world's most iconic dive watch. Black dial, Cerachrom bezel, Oyster bracelet. Pure Rolex DNA.
keyPoints: Rotating Cerachrom bezel with precision markings
Chromalight luminous indices for low-light visibility
Premium weight and finish on wrist
seoTitle: Rolex Submariner Date Black Dial | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Rolex Submariner Date (Black Dial) at Artemis — Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Premium range, 30-day guarantee, free shipping. $1,200 CAD.
